sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104904" key="tri/eidos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρί-ειδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἶδος</foreign> IV) <sense id="n104904.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">composed of three ingredients,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔμπλαστρος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.15</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>: cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑξάειδος, ἑπτάειδος, τετράειδος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
